description_long: This is a brown slip-on casual shoe with a low-cut design and a rounded toe. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or nubuck, with visible white stitching along the seams for added detail. The collar and heel area are padded and finished in a darker brown material, likely synthetic or textile, providing comfort and support. The sole is a light beige color, made from rubber or EVA, and features a slightly textured tread for grip. There is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing, and the interior is lined with a soft material for comfort. The overall design is simple, functional, and suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A brown slip-on casual shoe with white stitching, padded collar, and a light beige rubber sole, designed for comfort and everyday use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown upper, white stitching, padded collar, and light beige sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, seamless vamp, and subtle stitching details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same brown upper, stitching, and heel pull tab.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded heel, pull tab, and the back of the light beige sole.
